auto_fixes.question: The number of angles in the following figure is ______. ![](https://www.shaalaa.com/images/_4:a18323397af3470b88c4ec8ffaf8b367.png)
auto_fixes.explanation: The figure shows a quadrilateral with four interior angles at its vertices. Additionally, the two diagonals intersect inside the quadrilateral, forming four more angles at the intersection point. Thus, the total number of angles in the figure is eight.
